q.en: When and where was the Red Baron born?

explain.en: Manfred von Richthofen was born in 1892 in Germany. His family were minor nobles, so he was sometimes called a baron.
explain.zh: 曼弗雷德·冯·里希特霍芬于1892年生于德国。他的家族是低级贵族，因此有时被称为男爵。

q.en: Why did Richthofen want to join the flying service?
q.zh: 里希特霍芬为什么要加入飞行队？

options.en: He was tired of the trenches and excited by pilots in the clean air
options.zh: 他厌烦了战壕，又对晴空中飞行的飞行员心驰神往

options.en: He wanted to be a cavalry officer
He was ordered to by his father
He could not ride a horse

explain.en: Stuck in filthy trenches, he watched airplanes fly through clean air and wrote that joining the flying service became his 'greatest wish.'
explain.zh: 困在肮脏的战壕里，他看着飞机在晴空中飞行，并写道加入飞行队成了他“最大的愿望”。

q.zh: 怎样才算一名“王牌飞行员（ace）”？

options.en: Shooting down five or more enemy planes

explain.en: The book's 'Word Wise' says an ace is a pilot credited with shooting down five or more enemy planes. Richthofen became an ace by October 16, 1916.
explain.zh: 书中的“词汇角”说，王牌飞行员是指被记功击落五架或以上敌机的飞行员。里希特霍芬在1916年10月16日成为王牌。

q.en: Who trained Richthofen, and what was special about his teaching?
q.zh: 是谁训练了里希特霍芬，他的教学有什么特别？

options.en: Oswald Boelcke, who gave his men a list of eight rules
options.zh: 奥斯瓦尔德·伯尔克，他给部下列了八条规则
他的父亲，一名骑兵军官

explain.en: Richthofen joined the group led by Germany's greatest fighter pilot, Oswald Boelcke, who made a list of eight rules for combat.
explain.zh: 里希特霍芬加入了由德国最出色的战斗机飞行员奥斯瓦尔德·伯尔克率领的小组，伯尔克为作战列了八条规则。

q.en: Why was Richthofen's group called the 'Flying Circus'?
q.zh: 里希特霍芬的小组为什么被称为“飞行马戏团”？

options.en: He painted his plane red and his men painted theirs bright colors
options.zh: 他把飞机漆成红色，部下们也把飞机漆得五彩缤纷
他们在集市上表演特技

explain.en: Richthofen had his Albatros painted bright red to be seen in the sky; his men followed with bright colors, so the Allies called the colorful group the 'Flying Circus.'
explain.zh: 里希特霍芬把他的阿尔巴特罗斯战机漆成鲜红以便空中识别；部下们也漆上亮色，于是协约国称这个五彩的小组为“飞行马戏团”。

options.en: April 1917, when Richthofen's group shot down 89 British planes
options.zh: 1917年4月，里希特霍芬的小组击落了89架英国飞机
里希特霍芬出生的月份

explain.en: In April 1917 Richthofen's pilots shot down 89 planes of Britain's Royal Flying Corps; the RFC lost 245 aircraft that month, remembered as Bloody April.
explain.zh: 1917年4月，里希特霍芬的飞行员击落了英国皇家飞行队的89架飞机；皇家飞行队当月损失245架飞机，史称“血腥四月”。

options.en: Germany's highest military medal, awarded to Richthofen
options.zh: 德国最高军事勋章，授予了里希特霍芬

options.en: The name of his red plane
options.zh: 他那架红色飞机的名字

explain.en: With sixteen victories by January 1917, Richthofen was awarded Germany's highest military medal, the 'Blue Max,' and put in charge of his own fighter group.
explain.zh: 到1917年1月，里希特霍芬已取得16次胜利，获颁德国最高军事勋章“蓝马克斯”，并受命统领自己的战斗机中队。

q.en: Which plane is the Red Baron most remembered for flying?
q.zh: “红男爵”最让人记住的是驾驶哪种飞机？

options.en: The Fokker Triplane, with three sets of wings
options.zh: 福克三翼机，有三对机翼

explain.en: Returning to the front in August 1917, he traded his biplane for a slow but nimble triplane, which quickly became the aircraft he is most remembered for.
explain.zh: 1917年8月回到前线后，他换下双翼机，改飞虽慢却灵活的“三翼机”，这也成了他最被人记住的机型。

q.en: How many confirmed victories did the Red Baron have?
q.zh: “红男爵”有多少次被确认的战果？

explain.en: On April 20, 1918, he scored his eightieth victory. With eighty confirmed victories, he was the greatest ace of World War I.
explain.zh: 1918年4月20日，他取得第八十次胜利。凭借八十次被确认的战果，他成了第一次世界大战中最伟大的王牌飞行员。

q.en: Who is believed to have fired the shot that killed the Red Baron?
q.zh: 据信是谁开枪打死了“红男爵”？

options.en: Uncertain — a Canadian pilot or an Australian ground gunner
options.zh: 不确定——可能是加拿大飞行员，也可能是澳大利亚高射枪手

explain.en: No one is certain who fired the bullet. Canadians thought it was Captain Arthur Brown, but many historians believe it came from an Australian gunner on the ground.
explain.zh: 没人能确定是谁开的枪。加拿大人认为出自亚瑟·布朗上尉，但许多历史学家相信子弹来自一名澳大利亚高射枪手。

prompt.en: The Red Baron was a national hero to Germany but an enemy to the Allies. Was he a hero or a villain? Use evidence from the book to support your answer.
prompt.zh: “红男爵”在德国是民族英雄，对协约国却是敌人。他是英雄还是坏人？请用书中的证据来支持你的看法。

en: Note that the Allies buried him with full honors and called him 'our gallant and worthy foe.'
Consider both his skill as a pilot and the fact that war made him an enemy.
zh: 注意协约国以全套军礼安葬他，称他为“我们英勇可敬的敌人”。
既要考虑他作为飞行员的技艺，也要想到是战争使他成为敌人。
